description: Chinese triad formed by former Red Guards in Chinese prison camps in the late 1960s, later relocating to Hong Kong in the 1970s. Known for armed robberies, drug trafficking, and extreme violence. Described as one of the largest and most sophisticated criminal conspiracies in Canada.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Hong Kong , Guangzhou , Malaysia , United States , Canada , Australia
country_links.context: The Big Circle Gang has territory in Australia.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Big Circle Boys were described as 'one of the largest and most sophisticated criminal conspiracies' in Canada.
country_links.context: The Big Circle Gang operates in Canada, with activities including armed robberies, home invasions, kidnappings, human smuggling, and drug trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Hong Kong , Guangzhou , Malaysia , United States , Canada , Australia
country_links.context: The Big Circle Gang has territory in Hong Kong.

country_links.evidence_quote: Using connections in Asia, the Big Circle Boys were involved in smuggling heroin from the 'Golden Triangle' nations of Burma, Thailand and Laos...
country_links.context: The Big Circle Gang sources heroin from the Golden Triangle, which includes Laos.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Hong Kong , Guangzhou , Malaysia , United States , Canada , Australia
country_links.context: The Big Circle Gang has territory in Malaysia.

country_links.evidence_quote: Using connections in Asia, the Big Circle Boys were involved in smuggling heroin from the 'Golden Triangle' nations of Burma, Thailand and Laos...
country_links.context: The Big Circle Gang sources heroin from the Golden Triangle, which includes Burma.

country_links.evidence_quote: The gang expanded out of Hong Kong in the 1980s, settling operations in the Netherlands and Great Britain.
country_links.context: The Big Circle Gang expanded into the Netherlands, settling operations there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Using connections in Asia, the Big Circle Boys were involved in smuggling heroin from the 'Golden Triangle' nations of Burma, Thailand and Laos...
country_links.context: The Big Circle Gang sources heroin from the Golden Triangle, which includes Thailand.

country_links.evidence_quote: The gang expanded out of Hong Kong in the 1980s, settling operations in the Netherlands and Great Britain.
country_links.context: The Big Circle Gang expanded into Great Britain, settling operations there.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Big Circle Boys would sell the heroin at a markup to Chinese or Vietnamese street gangs... into Canada, the United States and Europe.
country_links.context: The Big Circle Gang smuggles heroin into the United States and has members there.
